name: Beer Beef Stew C/p
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine onions and cooking oil in a removable liner.
2. Place the liner in the base.
3. Cover and cook on high for 30 to 40 minutes, or until onions are soft.
4. Coat meat with a mixture of flour, salt, and pepper.
5. Add meat and all other ingredients to the removable liner in the base.
6. Cover and cook on auto setting for 6 hours; or low setting for 7-9 hours; or high setting for 4 hours.
7. To thicken sauce for gravy, uncover and cook on high for 20 to 30 minutes before serving.
8. Serve over noodles.
